scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.test: npm test --prefix frontend && npm test --prefix backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix frontend && npm run lint:fix --prefix backend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix frontend && npm run format --prefix backend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --prefix frontend && npm run format:check --prefix backend
